h1: Create Stunning YouTube Shorts Music Videos with AI in Minutes
direct_answer: An AI music video for YouTube Shorts is a tool that automatically creates professional youtube shorts-style music videos from your audio or text prompts. Tunee's platform uses advanced machine learning to produce quick visuals featuring text-to-video prompts and 60-second format visuals, tailored to your track's energy and style. With Tunee, you can go from idea to a finished youtube shorts music video in minutes, no video editing experience required.

A punchy montage of bold title card and 60-second format, layered with smooth transitions and visual beats matching the drop
Final sequence featuring subscribe bump and vertical 9:16 converging in a quick explosion of light, color, and movement

faqs.q: Does it support exporting YouTube Shorts music videos in 4K resolution?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Tunee exports YouTube Shorts music videos in up to 4K resolution, making them ready for YouTube, streaming platforms, and large-screen displays.

faqs.q: How do I customize the visual style of my YouTube Shorts music video?
faqs.a: You can guide the visuals using text prompts that describe scenes, moods, and settings. Tunee's AI interprets your input and generates 60-second format-inspired visuals that match your YouTube Shorts aesthetic.

faqs.q: Does it work with any genre of music, or only YouTube Shorts?
faqs.a: Tunee supports a wide range of genres and visual styles beyond YouTube Shorts. You can generate music videos for pop, hip-hop, classical, and dozens of other styles using the same platform.

faqs.q: How do I add lyrics or subtitles to my YouTube Shorts music video?
faqs.a: Tunee offers built-in lyric and subtitle overlay options. Simply enter your lyrics and choose a text style, and the AI will sync them to your YouTube Shorts music video automatically.

faqs.q: Does Tunee's YouTube Shorts music video generator work on mobile devices?
faqs.a: Tunee is fully accessible via web browser on both desktop and mobile, so you can create YouTube Shorts music videos from any device without installing software.
